---
type: npc
name: "Lord Varos"
status: dead
location: "[[Ironhold]]"

tags: [noble, antagonist]
---

Lord Varos was the last commander of the Silver Order. He fell during the Siege of Ironhold when the Shadow Court breached the walls.

His legendary blade, the [[Blade of the First King]], was lost in the chaos.
